svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(71, 85, 105), rgb(155, 167, 184));
fill: light-dark(rgb(226, 232, 240), rgb(34, 39, 46)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(71, 85, 105), rgb(155, 167, 184));
